---
title: "VitalDB — Exploratory Analysis"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    theme: [darkly, theme.scss]
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Overview

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import os

from dashboard_theme import TEMPLATE, PALETTE, COLORS   # ← just another import
```

# Siddhesh

```{python}

```

# Leab

```{python}

```

# Jasmine

```{python}

```

# Anish

```{python}

```

# Kish

```{python}

```
